name: itsribbZ-godspeed
description: Structured prompt protocol pack for Claude Code. Ships a skill + hooks that load a detailed instruction set when the word 'godspeed' appears in a prompt.

plugins.name: godspeed
plugins.description: Instruction-set skill that activates when the word 'godspeed' appears in any prompt. Ships a fuzzy-match trigger hook and telemetry hooks. Optional pro features require separate Toke install.
